sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13862" key="a)postilbo/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποστιλβόω</orth>, <sense id="n13862.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make to shine,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κύπελλον</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.339</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
